creator: tz@freebsd.org
text:
Aloha,

i ported the Nyxt Webbrowser to FreeBSD and an old Webkit Version hits it. Is there anything i can help you with to finish this PR?

Also, I saw in the Review, that you updated to 2.44.2. The latest version should be 2.45.5.

I am not a C developer, but i can support you with build-tests ( i have a small server cluster) and testing. 

Please let me know, how we can get this done :)

Best,
Torsten
